code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import NavBar from'../comps/NavBar';import PartsTable from'../comps/PartsTable';import PartDetails from'../comps/PartDetails';import ImportPartModal from'../comps/ImportPartModal';import BlockerPartsModal from'../comps/BlockerPartsModal';import'./parts.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const PartsPage=()=>{const[selectedPart,setSelectedPart]=useState(null);const[showImportPartModal,setShowImportPartModal]=useState(false);const[showBlockerPartsModal,setShowBlockerPartsModal]=useState(false);const[isEditingBlocker,setIsEditingBlocker]=useState(false);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(NavBar,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-left-pane",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"pm-small-button",onClick:()=>setShowImportPartModal(true),children:"Import Parts"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{marginBottom:'1rem'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"pm-small-button",onClick:()=>{if(!selectedPart){alert('Please select a part first');return;}setIsEditingBlocker(false);setShowBlockerPartsModal(true);},children:"+ Add Risk/Issue"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"pm-small-button",onClick:()=>{if(!selectedPart){alert('Please select a part first');return;}setIsEditingBlocker(true);setShowBlockerPartsModal(true);},children:"Edit Risk/Issue"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PartsTable,{selectedPart:selectedPart,onSelectPart:setSelectedPart})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pm-right-pane",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Part Details"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PartDetails,{part:selectedPart})]}),showImportPartModal&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ImportPartModal,{onClose:()=>setShowImportPartModal(false)}),showBlockerPartsModal&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BlockerPartsModal,{isEditing:isEditingBlocker,part:selectedPart,onClose:()=>setShowBlockerPartsModal(false)})]});};export default PartsPage;
